query:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS payroll_batch_items;

CREATE TABLE payroll_batch_items (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  batch_id INT NOT NULL,
  worker_id INT NOT NULL,
  days_worked INT DEFAULT 0,
  base_amount DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  total_deductions DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  total_bonuses DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  net_amount DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  notes TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_payroll_items_batch_id (batch_id),
  INDEX idx_payroll_items_worker_id (worker_id),
  INDEX idx_payroll_items_batch_worker (batch_id, worker_id)
);

DELETE FROM payroll_batches WHERE id IN (1, 2);
